allow: Bash(find . -name "*.jsx" -exec sed -i -e 's/text-sapphire dark:text-sapphire/text-orange/g' -e 's/text-sapphire\\/80/text-navy-mid/g' -e 's/text-sapphire/text-orange/g' -e 's/bg-sapphire\\/5/bg-orange\\/5/g' -e 's/bg-sapphire\\/10/bg-orange\\/10/g' -e 's/bg-sapphire\\/15/bg-orange\\/12/g' -e 's/bg-sapphire rounded-l-full/bg-navy-mid rounded-l-full/g' -e 's/bg-sapphire inline-block/bg-navy-mid inline-block/g' -e 's/hover:bg-sapphire/hover:bg-orange/g' -e 's/hover:text-sapphire/hover:text-orange-dark/g' {} +)
Bash(sed -i 's/className=""py-20 lg:py-32 bg-white dark:bg-navy transition/className=""py-16 sm:py-20 lg:py-32 bg-white dark:bg-navy transition/g' FAQ.jsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/className=""py-20 lg:py-32 relative overflow-hidden transition/className=""py-16 sm:py-20 lg:py-32 relative overflow-hidden transition/g' Requirements.jsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/className=""py-20 lg:py-32 bg-navy relative overflow/className=""py-16 sm:py-20 lg:py-32 bg-navy relative overflow/g' CTA.jsx)
